# callEventHandler

**Instance Property**

A closure dispatched when a call changes state.

## Declaration

```swift
var callEventHandler: ((CTCall) -> Void)? { get set }
```

## Responding to Cellular Call Events

- **currentCalls**: An array representing the cellular calls in progress.
